title: RAR File Extractor
description: Extract files from RAR archives online instantly and securely.

faq.question: How do I extract a RAR file?
faq.answer: Upload your RAR file to Converigo, and the contents will be extracted and ready for download immediately.

faq.question: Is the extraction secure?
faq.answer: Yes, files are processed securely on our servers and automatically deleted after extraction.

faq.question: What file sizes are supported?
faq.answer: RAR files up to 500MB can be extracted instantly on Converigo.

faq.question: Can I extract RAR5 format files?
faq.answer: Yes, both RAR4 and RAR5 formats are supported for extraction.

faq.question: What about password-protected RAR files?
faq.answer: Password-protected RAR files require the correct password for successful extraction.

faq.question: Do you support multi-volume RAR archives?
faq.answer: Multi-part RAR archives require all volumes to be present for complete extraction.

faq.question: What if extraction fails?
faq.answer: If extraction fails, ensure the RAR file is not corrupted and try re-uploading.

faq.question: Can I extract RAR files on my phone?
faq.answer: Yes, Converigo works on all modern browsers and devices.

about_formats.title: What is a RAR file?
about_formats.text: RAR is a powerful archive format known for high compression ratios. It's commonly used for large file collections and often requires WinRAR to open on Windows.

about_formats.title: Why extract a RAR file?
about_formats.answer: Extracting RAR files allows you to access the original contents, modify files, and view the folder structure without needing WinRAR.

about_formats.title: RAR compression
about_formats.text: RAR provides efficient lossless compression. Extracted files are identical to the originals and maintain their properties.

cta.title: Extract RAR files in seconds
cta.text: Upload your RAR archive and get all files instantly.
